<!--
This repo is a public mirror. Source-of-truth lives in the private CryptFlare
platform monorepo and is synced here on tag. Most code changes should land in
the monorepo first.

Acceptable PRs against this repo:
- README, examples, typo fixes, docs corrections
- CI / workflow improvements scoped to this repo
- Security advisories, CODEOWNERS, issue templates

For SDK behavior changes, please open an issue first so we can route the change
through the canonical source.
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] My change is scoped (no SDK source edits in this mirror).
- [ ] I confirmed CI passes locally where possible.
